constructor_signature.detail: Constructor takes (fig, robot, visualizer) with type annotations: matlab.ui.Figure, robot.Robot, robot.Visualizer at lines 13-16

WindowKeyPressFcn.detail: Binds fig.WindowKeyPressFcn (not KeyPressFcn) at line 19 — per skill guidance

CloseRequestFcn.detail: Binds fig.CloseRequestFcn = @obj.onClose at line 20 for clean shutdown

run_loop.detail: Real-time loop with physics sub-stepping (ceil(RenderDt/PhysicsDt) iterations per frame) at lines 23-36

drawnow_limitrate.detail: Uses drawnow limitrate at line 32 (not drawnow)

run_exits_cleanly.detail: while loop condition checks both obj.Running && ishandle(obj.Figure) at line 25; onClose sets Running=false and deletes figure

setCommand.detail: setCommand(direction, amount) calls obj.Robot.move(direction, amount) at line 39

onKeyPress_keys.detail: All 13 keys mapped: uparrow→FORWARD, downarrow→BACKWARD, leftarrow→YAW_LEFT, rightarrow→YAW_RIGHT, w→UP, s→DOWN, a→ROLL_LEFT, d→ROLL_RIGHT, q→PITCH_UP, e→PITCH_DOWN, space→STOP, r→reset, escape→close (lines 46-71)

LastKey_recorded.detail: obj.LastKey = evt.Key set at line 73 after every key press

RenderDt_default.detail: RenderDt default 0.02 (50 FPS / 20 ms) at line 8

default_argument.detail: robotType defaults to 'DifferentialDrive' at line 3; callable as startRobot() or startRobot('DifferentialDrive')

params_struct.detail: Creates params with geometry (wheelRadius, trackWidth) and dynamics (mass, inertia, maxTorque) at lines 10-14

figure_properties.detail: Figure with white background (Color='white'), correct title (Name='matlab-robotics: DifferentialDrive') at lines 20-23

Visualizer_created.detail: Creates Visualizer(ax) and calls vis.addRobot(robot) at lines 26-27

Controller_created_and_run.detail: Creates Controller(fig, robot, vis) at line 29 and calls ctrl.run() at line 34

blocks_while_open.detail: ctrl.run() is the blocking main loop; execution stays in run() until figure closes

prints_controls.detail: fprintf at lines 32-33 prints robot type and control instructions

errors_unknown_type.detail: switch otherwise at line 17: error('Unknown robot type: %s', robotType)

KeyPressFcn_disabled.detail: Sets KeyPressFcn=[] at line 23 to prevent interference with WindowKeyPressFcn (set by Controller)

all_files_parse.detail: By inspection: Controller.m (81 lines), startRobot.m (35 lines), DifferentialDrive.m (152 lines), Visualizer.m (53 lines), Robot.m (72 lines), Direction.m (10 lines), DynamicsEngine.m (26 lines), Utils.m (44 lines) — all syntactically valid MATLAB

import_robot_works.detail: import robot.* at startRobot.m line 6 resolves all classes in +robot/ package

DifferentialDrive_move_UP_noop.detail: move() otherwise case at DifferentialDrive.m line 43 is empty — UP, DOWN, ROLL, PITCH are silently ignored for ground robot

physics_sub_stepping.detail: run() sub-steps physics: ceil(0.02/0.005)=4 iterations per render frame. PhysicsDt (5 ms) << RenderDt (20 ms)

onClose_call_support.detail: onClose(obj,~,~) accepts both CloseRequestFcn callback (src,evt) and bare obj.onClose() call from escape key — MATLAB tolerates omitted trailing ~ args

notes: startRobot.m sets KeyPressFcn=[] in figure constructor to prevent default key handling; Controller then binds WindowKeyPressFcn. This is consistent with the keyboard-control skill guidance.
Controller.onKeyPress uses 'escape' to call obj.onClose() directly (not via CloseRequestFcn). The onClose method signature with ~ args handles both call patterns.
No ADR 0003 found for Phase 03; the implementation follows the interaction design in docs/guide/interaction.md and the keyboard-control skill.
